case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MISAEL ALVAREZ CASTILLO

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 3/15/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO SUCH NUMBER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $975.29 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MISAEL ALVAREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MISAEL ALVAREZ $975.29 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,060.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED JAN-29-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MISAEL ALVAREZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT MISAEL ALVAREZ CASTILLO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.
